===Tmux===

Tmux is a terminal multiplexer, it is used to have multiple shell sessions withing one windows and jumping between them with ease

Defaults:
	To start giving command to Tmux after starting it use the command [CTRL + B]:
		- c => creates new Tmux window
		- "a number" => open that window
		- [SHIFT + %] => split vertically
		- [SHIFT + "] => split horizontally
		- [ARROW KEYS] => move between windows
		- [&] => close current window
link to more complete [cheatsheet](https://tmuxcheatsheet.com/)
